title: Soulection Radio Show #401 (Jarreau Vandal Radio)
content:
Dutch DJ and Producer [Jarreau Vandal](https://twitter.com/jarreauvandal) takes over Soulection Radio.



<!--more-->

Follow Jarreau Vandal on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/jarreauvandal), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/jarreauvandal/) and most importantly [SoundCloud](https://soundcloud.com/jarreauvandal).

markers.rawTrack: Arin Ray - We Ain't Homies (feat. YG)
